sql.name: getCouponUsageStatistics
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CLAIMED_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(cu.STATUS AS INT) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS USED_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(cu.STATUS AS INT) = 1 THEN COALESCE(o.ACTUAL_PRICE, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PULLED_GMV FROM litemall_coupon_user cu LEFT JOIN litemall_order o ON o.ID = cu.ORDER_ID AND CAST(o.DELETED AS INT) = 0 WHERE CAST(cu.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND (${couponId} IS NULL OR cu.COUPON_ID = ${couponId}) AND cu.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND cu.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}

sql.name: getPromotionEffectiveness
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(*) AS PROMOTED_ORDER_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(ORDER_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_GMV, COALESCE(SUM(PROMOTION_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_DISCOUNT, 0 AS PARTICIPANT_COUNT FROM litemall_order WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) NOT IN (102, 103) AND PROMOTION_PRICE IS NOT NULL AND PROMOTION_PRICE > 0 AND ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}

sql.name: getPromotionEffectivenessByActivity
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.ORDER_ID) AS PROMOTED_ORDER_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(o.ACTUAL_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_GMV, COALESCE(SUM(u.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT), 0) AS TOTAL_DISCOUNT, COUNT(DISTINCT u.USER_ID) AS PARTICIPANT_COUNT FROM litemall_promotion_usage u LEFT JOIN litemall_order o ON o.ID = u.ORDER_ID AND CAST(o.DELETED AS INT) = 0 WHERE CAST(u.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND u.PROMOTION_ACTIVITY_ID = ${activityId} AND u.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND u.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}

sql.name: getPinTuanEffectiveness
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(*) AS OPENED_GROUPS, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(g.STATUS AS INT) = 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SUCCESS_GROUPS, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.USER_ID) FROM litemall_pin_tuan_member m INNER JOIN litemall_pin_tuan_group g2 ON g2.ID = m.GROUP_ID WHERE CAST(m.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND (${activityId} IS NULL OR g2.ACTIVITY_ID = ${activityId}) AND g2.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND g2.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS PARTICIPANT_COUNT, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.ACTUAL_PRICE), 0) FROM litemall_pin_tuan_member m INNER JOIN litemall_pin_tuan_group g3 ON g3.ID = m.GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN litemall_order o ON o.ID = m.ORDER_ID AND CAST(o.DELETED AS INT) = 0 WHERE CAST(m.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND (${activityId} IS NULL OR g3.ACTIVITY_ID = ${activityId}) AND g3.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND g3.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS TOTAL_GMV FROM litemall_pin_tuan_group g WHERE CAST(g.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND (${activityId} IS NULL OR g.ACTIVITY_ID = ${activityId}) AND g.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND g.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}

sql.name: getFlashSaleEffectiveness
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(*) AS DEAL_ORDER_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(o.ACTUAL_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_GMV, COUNT(DISTINCT o.USER_ID) AS PARTICIPANT_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM litemall_log l WHERE CAST(l.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND l.ACTION = 'flashSaleBuy:maxPerUser' AND l.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND l.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS REJECTED_COUNT FROM litemall_order o WHERE CAST(o.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND o.FLASH_SALE_SESSION_ID IS NOT NULL AND CAST(o.ORDER_STATUS AS INT) NOT IN (102, 103) AND (${flashSaleId} IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM litemall_flash_sale_session s WHERE s.ID = o.FLASH_SALE_SESSION_ID AND s.FLASH_SALE_ID = ${flashSaleId})) AND o.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND o.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}
